label: 第146話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.67
summary_short: 天元から死滅回游の規則と結界の仕組みを聞き、虎杖たちは得点移動などの新規則追加を目指す。羂索に覚醒させられた芸人・髙羽史彦も参加者となる。
summary_full: 天元は日本各地の十の結界と死滅回游の総則を説明する。泳者は参加宣誓後19日以内に得点を変動させなければ術式を剥奪されるため、一行は得点の譲渡と離脱を可能にする新規則を追加する方針を立てる。乙骨は先行して結界へ入り、真希は禪院家から呪具を回収、虎杖と伏黒は停学中の秤を勧誘、パンダは捜索へ向かう。天元の護衛には九十九と脹相のどちらかが残る。一方、羂索に術式を覚醒させられた芸人・髙羽史彦も泳者として動き始める。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 and his allies review the complex rules of the 死滅回游 and formulate a plan to navigate the dangerous battle royal. Everyone is given a role to execute and they move out to stop the ritual. However, the games have already begun and normal people have awakened new abilities, people like the comedian named 高羽史彦 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: The ten colonies of the 死滅回游 forming a line across japan. 恵 is surprised to hear that 来栖華 is capable of extinguishing cursed techniques . 天元 repeats that the 天使の technique will be necessary to open the back of 獄門疆 . 恵 asks where the 天使 is and 天元 only knows that she's in the colony on the east side of 東京. There are ten colonies that are connected by barriers that form a line down Japan. This line of barriers will merge everyone in Japan with 天元 and  "convey them to the other side". Hokkaido isn't included because it's been established as a sacred area. The idea of evolving humanity by merging them with 天元の current state is a complex one to grasp and sounds exaggerated. However, as a testament to how serious this situation is, 天元 reveals a curse that befell every single person in Japan in preparation for the merger. They believe it will only take about two months to complete the ritual. The group goes over the rules of the 死滅回游. The first rule states a player must declare their participation in 19 days. It's currently 9 A.M. on November 9th and all the players awakened around midnight on October 31st. This gives 津美紀 ten days and fifteen hours to participate in the game. The second rule states that anyone who breaks the first rule will be subject to 術式 removal. 真希 talked with 家入硝子 about this rule of the game beforehand. 硝子 believes that 術式 removal implies that it's not through 無為転変 or a 縛り . She thinks that something must happen to the user's brain, which would kill them. Otherwise, all the players could simply refuse to declare participation. 天元 confirms 硝子's theory, meaning 真希 and people who don't have cursed techniques aren't at risk. 硝子 correctly theorizing on how 術式 removal works. Rule number three dictates that anyone who enters a colony after the games have begun will be considered an official participant. Civilians inside the barrier will be given one chance to exit and there are no rules about entering or exiting colonies. At the start of the 死滅回游, players are given the goal of exiting the colony's barriers. This serves as an effective way to stimulate participation and get players moving. In order to confine the players effectively, they must believe that entered the games of their own free will. This works in accordance with a 縛り that increases the barrier's power. The fourth rule is the one that states players score points by killing one another. The fifth one specifies that each player's point value is determined by the game master. As a general rule, sorcerers are worth five points and non-sorcerers are worth one. 恵 asks about the game master and 天元 explains that each player receives a 式神 known as a コガネ . A コガネ serves as the game's interface while the game's master serves as the program that backs it. This concept somewhat confuses 悠仁, leaving him in a comically lost state. Rule six states that players can spend one hundred of their own scored points to negotiate a new rule into the game. Rules can't be subtracted, but 恵 thinks they might be able to create other stipulations as roundabout ways to counter them. In accordance with rule six, rule seven states that the game master must accept any new rule as long as it doesn't have a long-lasting effect on the game. The group wonders if the rules are fair but 天元 assures them that 羂索 receives no bias and they can expect to be treated fairly. 悠仁 thanks 脹相 before taking off. The eighth and final rule states a player will be subject to 術式 removal if their score doesn't change for 19 days. 悠仁 is worried he'll have to kill others again but 恵 has a few ideas. With all the information thoroughly reviewed, 真希 goes over everyone's role for the future. 由基 and 脹相 will remain at the 薨星宮 to guard 天元様. 真希 will return to the 禪院 clan to collect 呪具 for the coming battles. Soon after 五条悟 was sealed, the 禪院 and 加茂 clans took all the 呪具 from 呪術高専 's cursed warehouse. Now that 恵 is the 禪院 clan's leader, 真希 will be able to get them. This revelation comes as a surprise to 悠仁 but 恵 says he'll explain another time. 真希 inquires about the location of 組屋鞣造 's workshop which she will go to before recruiting パンダ . 憂太 will take part in the 死滅回游 right away to gather information long before 津美紀 and others participate. He'll be on his own again, but 憂太 will avoid nearby colonies to prevent collateral and he might be out of touch since the barriers likely block cellphone reception. He quickly realizes this presents an issue because the senpai told 悠仁 he would kill him should 宿儺 appear again. They both think about the best solution but 恵 makes 悠仁 stop. 恵 says that 憂太 can just kill 悠仁 if he dies but 悠仁 wants to prevent that in the first place. Failing stand up comedian turned 死滅回游 player: 高羽史彦. 真希 tells 悠仁 and 恵 their role is to find 秤金次 and recruit him. 秤 is a suspended third-year student who's moody but their group is shorthanded. Despite his attitude, 秤 is apparently extremely tough. 憂太 goes as far as to say that when riled up, 秤 surpasses him in strength, but 真希 doesn't exactly agree with this statement. Everyone moves out, but not before 悠仁 thanks 脹相 for everything. 脹相 tells 悠仁 not to die and as his little brother leaves, 由基 notices 脹相 trying to hide some tears. Meanwhile, at a comedy club called the Public Stand, a crowd of people are bored with a comedy act that completely bombed. 高羽史彦 is a failing comedian who never gets any laughs from his dumb jokes. His associate tells the thirty-five-year-old to quit because he's simply not funny. With the way 東京 is right now, the man advises 高羽 to find something he's better cut out for. Another associate of 高羽's named Ken says he doesn't mind his dumb jokes. Ken thinks two types of comedians will always be in demand: comics who are funny and comics who wholeheartedly believe their funny. Ken asks 高羽 which of the two he believes he is. 高羽 says it's fifty-fifty at first, before receiving a strange impulse. Then he decides to change his answer to "seventy-thirty". 高羽史彦 is not only one of these two types of comedians, he is also a player in the 死滅回游.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 来栖華 (言及のみ) 九十九由基 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 乙骨憂太 脹相 禪院真希 天元 家入硝子 パンダ (言及のみ) 羂索 (言及のみ) 五条悟 (言及のみ) 伏黒津美紀 (言及のみ) 宿儺 (言及のみ) 秤金次 (言及のみ) 高羽史彦
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 呪術高専 薨星宮 The Public Stand Comedy Club 薨星宮
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪物 獄門疆 式神 コガネ

key_events_verified_phase8: 天元が十の結界と総則を説明する
得点譲渡と死滅回游離脱の規則追加を目標にする
乙骨・真希・虎杖・伏黒・パンダの役割を分担する
九十九と脹相の一方が天元の護衛に残る
髙羽史彦が覚醒型の泳者となる
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
